tasks.title: Implement Task Service CRUD in Ollie Spanner
tasks.description: Write transactional CRUD rules and schema tables for Tasks in Ollie Spanner, ensuring recursive sub-task queries and cycle checks.

tasks.title: Configure Webhooks for Gmail and Google Chat
tasks.description: Set up WS event listeners to parse notifications and feed normalized payloads to the core Task Ingestion controller.

tasks.title: Build ReAct Cognitive Loop in Sobi Harness
tasks.description: Implement Sobi's active Reason-and-Act runtime using Gemini 2.5 Pro with support for Workspace MCP tool integrations.

tasks.title: Set up DBSCAN clustering in Memory Dream Cron
tasks.description: Build background density clustering algorithms for Memory DB to identify near-duplicates and auto-generate consensus.

tasks.title: Draft UX Research Synthesis for Baseline Workflow
tasks.description: Compile NYC office in-person interviews and artifact-audit notes on tool ecosystems into a definitive user story report.

tasks.title: Verify RBAC evaluation tree under Workstream Service
tasks.description: Verify direct and delegated human/agent roles for workspace assets prior to command dispatching.
